title: Liberation of Coruscant (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Liberation of Coruscant''' might refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Liberation of Coruscant]], the battle during the [[Jedi-Sith War]].

==Legends==
*[[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]] where the Galactic Capital returned to the hands of the [[New Republic/Legends|Republic]] after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*[[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] where the [[Terraforming/Legends|vongformed]] [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|''Yuuzhan'tar'']] was recaptured by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].
*[[Liberation of Coruscant (Lost Tribe of Sith emergence)|Liberation of Coruscant]], wherein the [[New Jedi Order]] fought to take control of Coruscant back from the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]] and [[Abeloth]].
{{Disambig}}

[[Category:Battles of Coruscant| ]]
